Notice Of Motion And Motion To Comel Response And For Sanction
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Marie Califano's Motion To Compel Response To Demand For Inspection is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $600, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
